response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack and systems developer, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Their C++ experience is limited to a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a university thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. They show no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MongoDB/MySQL instead), and no capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure beyond a short fintech role at RIDE Capital that used Node.js/TypeScript rather than C++. The gap between the candidate's web/Node/DLang specialization and this C++/fixed-income consulting engagement is too wide.
strengths: Strong low-latency systems experience (DLang, async I/O, high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby)
Solid engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and developer tooling
Broad polyglot background with some C/C++ exposure and Java familiarity
concerns: No substantial professional C++ experience — only ~6 months, and not clearly Windows-focused
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general engineering and low-latency systems background
